item.title: Finger.exe & ClickFix, (Sun, Nov 16th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: The finger.exe command is used in ClickFix attacks.

item.title: SANS Holiday Hack Challenge 2025, (Sun, Nov 16th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: The SANS Holiday Hack Challenge™ 2025 is available.

item.title: Honeypot: FortiWeb CVE-2025-64446 Exploits, (Sat, Nov 15th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: Like many have reported, we too noticed exploit attempts for CVE-2025-64446 in our honeypots.

item.title: Digital Doppelgangers: Anatomy of Evolving Impersonation Campaigns Distributing Gh0st RAT
item.author: Keerthiraj Nagaraj, Vishwa Thothathri, Nabeel Mohamed and Reethika Ramesh
item.content:encoded: Two campaigns delivering Gh0st RAT to Chinese speakers show a deep understanding of the target population's virtual environment and online behavior.

item.title: Microsoft Office Russian Dolls, (Fri, Nov 14th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Friday, November 14th, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9700, (Fri, Nov 14th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
